'''Taan''' was a [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Stationed aboard the ''[[Stalking Moon]]'', Taan offered to help [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] in communicating with the rest of the Yuuzhan Vong fleet preparing to attack [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]]. However, she only agreed after she had seen [[Tahiri Veila]], whom she knew as the [[Tahiri Veila|One-who-was-shaped]].<ref name="Rebirth" />
